title: Gold Panning at Gold Creek from Juneau, Alaska
description:
While in Juneau, Alaska, try your hand at panning for gold at Gold Creek. 

Find other Juneau, Alaska tours and activities here: https://bit.ly/3f1EEAg

On this tour, step back in time to the days of the Alaskan Gold Rush. After a quick Juneau historical tour, head to special-access areas near Gold Creek to pan for gold. Experience the history that put Alaska on the map, and, like a true prospector, keep any gold that you find.

Find and book over 300,000+ travel experiences you’ll remember!

(upbeat music)

- Alaska is known as the
great northern frontier

and today we're going to
experience a little bit

of what the gold rush
might have been like.
We're going gold panning.
(upbeat music)
- You could look at this pan and think
there is nothing in here.

But you gotta check to
see what's at the bottom.
Tour guide knew what he was talking about.
- Gold, gold, gold.
This is so fun.
So we started out at Gold Creek.

Our tour guide is so
knowledgeable and hilarious.

He shows us the entire
process of panning for gold
and now we're ready to do it ourselves.
(upbeat music)

Step number one, I'm
cleaning all of the silt
out of my dirt.

Step number two, I think
this is gonna be my favorite,
is shaking.
So you want to shake the pan
because the gold is so heavy that
it's gonna sink to the bottom.
I'm feeling lucky, man.
Oh my gosh, oh my gosh, oh my gosh.
I think I found a little bit of gold.
Check this out, look it, look it, look it!
Alright, it looks small, I know, I know,
but it's a big deal because there might be
a lot more in here.
The story of gold in this creek
starts at the very top of that mountain.
There's a glacier that's melting
and grinding away those pieces of gold
and then they make their way down here.
Oh baby, look at this, look at this!
- I found a little gold today.
I think it's great, I think it's great

to learn the history of how
they did this 100 years ago.
- I really enjoyed learning how to do this
and it's such surprise when you see gold

- Well I may not have
found my fortune in gold,
but today was a fun way to experience

the history that put
